receipt_date.text: วันที่ทำรายการ

root.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_print, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no, sc_com_m_receipt.recept_amount, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status, sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.balance, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, security_users.names as users_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_name, sc_fin_vourcher_head.journal_date, '' as fines_amount, '' as reason_cancel, sc_com_m_receipt.calcint_date FROM sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_receipt, security_users, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status, sc_fin_vourcher_head WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( security_users.names = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.vourcher_no = sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ASC
